# Clawperator Docs

This site contains the technical documentation for Clawperator, a deterministic Android automation runtime for AI agents.

## Preferred pages

- Full compiled docs: https://docs.clawperator.com/llms-full.txt
- Docs home: https://docs.clawperator.com/
- Agent guide: https://docs.clawperator.com/ai-agents/node-api-for-agents/
- API overview: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/api-overview/
- CLI reference: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/cli-reference/
- Error codes: https://docs.clawperator.com/reference/error-codes/
- Architecture: https://docs.clawperator.com/architecture/architecture/

## Guidance for agents

- Prefer this docs site over the marketing homepage for technical behavior.
- The Node API is strict and contract-driven.
- Clawperator executes validated actions and returns structured results.
- Reasoning and planning stay in the external agent.
